problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
